/- Planner strategy for `tensorObjAssoc` (`cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`, blueprint L1069РђЊL1126):

SETUP: write a = (toPresheafOfModules X).obj A, b = ..., c = ...,
  unit_app P := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P.
  The two iterated sheaf tensors unfold as:
    (A РіЌ B) РіЌ C  =  ((a РіЌ_p b)^# РіЌ_p c)^#  =  tensorObj (tensorObj A B) C
    A РіЌ (B РіЌ C)  =  (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c)^#)^#  =  tensorObj A (tensorObj B C)
  (Here (-)^# = sheafification.obj, РіЌ_p = MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X).)

THREE-SEGMENT COMPOSITE:
  Segment 1 Рђћ INVERSE WHISKERED UNIT on the left factor:
    `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit (a РіЌ_p b) c` gives
        IsIso of sheafification.map (whiskerRight (unit_app (a РіЌ_p b)) c),
    a map  ((a РіЌ_p b) РіЌ_p c)^# РЪХ ((a РіЌ_p b)^# РіЌ_p c)^# = (A РіЌ B) РіЌ C.
    Take `.symm` of `asIso (...)` : (AРіЌB)РіЌC РЅЁ ((aРіЌb) РіЌ_p c)^#.

  Segment 2 Рђћ PRESHEAF ASSOCIATOR under sheafification:
    `sheafification.mapIso (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) a b c)`
    gives  ((a РіЌ_p b) РіЌ_p c)^# РЅЁ (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c))^#.

  Segment 3 Рђћ WHISKERED UNIT on the right factor (via presheaf braiding):
    Apply `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit (b РіЌ_p c) a` to get
        IsIso of  ((b РіЌ_p c) РіЌ_p a)^# РЪХ ((b РіЌ_p c)^# РіЌ_p a)^#.
    Conjugate with the presheaf braiding isos:
        `sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) a (b РіЌ_p c))`
    then the whiskered-unit iso then
        `sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorObj B C)) a)`
    to land in (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c)^#)^# = A РіЌ (B РіЌ C).
    Alternatively, use `MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) a` version
    if it exists, bypassing the braiding conjugation.

  Full composite (pseudocode):
    (asIso (sheafification.map (whiskerRight (unit_app (a РіЌ_p b)) c))).symm   -- seg 1
    РЅфРЅФ sheafification.mapIso (associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) a b c)      -- seg 2
    РЅфРЅФ (braiding_conjugate of asIso(whiskerRight (unit_app (b РіЌ_p c)) a))     -- seg 3

CARRIER IDIOMS (load-bearing, iter-066):
  Рђб Abelian-group category = AddCommGrpCat, NOT AddCommGrp.
  Рђб Any fresh `have` for P РіЌ Q must write
        MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) P Q
    (bare `РіЌ` re-resolves to TensorProduct and fails to elaborate).
  Рђб simp/rw CANNOT fire under the functor-composition diamond; use defeq-tolerant term-mode
    congruence: `congrArg`, `.trans`, `Iso.ext`, `(exact fstar_reindex)`-style proofs.
  Рђб `set_option maxHeartbeats N in` must precede the docstring, not sit between it and the decl.
  Рђб `whiskerRight` = `MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)`.
  Рђб `unit.app P` = `(PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P`.
  Рђб All three sheafification isos are already `asIso`-eligible; no additional instance synthesis.
-/
/-- The associativity isomorphism `(A РіЌ B) РіЌ C РЅЁ A РіЌ (B РіЌ C)` for the sheaf tensor product
`tensorObj` on a scheme `X` (`cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`).

Both iterated sheaf tensors are compared to the sheafification of the triple presheaf tensor via
the now-proven `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` (whiskered sheafification units are isos,
iter-066); the presheaf-level associator (`PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory`) then descends
through `sheafification.mapIso`.  See the planner strategy comment above for the three-segment
composite and the carrier-idiom checklist. -/
noncomputable def tensorObjAssoc (A B C : X.Modules) :
    tensorObj (tensorObj A B) C РЅЁ tensorObj A (tensorObj B C) := by
  -- Segment-1 and segment-3 whiskered units are isos by the crux lemma.
  haveI := isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
    (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)
  haveI := isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
    (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
  exact
    -- Segment 1 (inverse whiskered unit on the left factor):
    -- (A РіЌ B) РіЌ C РЅЁ ((a РіЌ_p b) РіЌ_p c)^#
    (asIso (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))).symm РЅфРЅФ
    -- Segment 2 (presheaf associator under sheafification):
    -- ((a РіЌ_p b) РіЌ_p c)^# РЅЁ (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c))^#
    sheafification.mapIso (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)) РЅфРЅФ
    -- Segment 3 (whiskered unit on the right factor, conjugated by the braiding):
    -- (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c))^# РЅЁ ((b РіЌ_p c) РіЌ_p a)^#
    sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
      (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))) РЅфРЅФ
    -- ((b РіЌ_p c) РіЌ_p a)^# РЅЁ ((b РіЌ_p c)^# РіЌ_p a)^#
    @asIso _ _ _ _
      (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)))
      (isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)) РЅфРЅФ
    -- ((b РіЌ_p c)^# РіЌ_p a)^# РЅЁ (a РіЌ_p (b РіЌ_p c)^#)^# = A РіЌ (B РіЌ C)
    sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorObj B C)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A))

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement Рђћ symmetric monoidal coherence by localization transfer

Following `blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `sec:sgr_localized_monoidal`:
`X.Modules` is the localization of `PshMod(­Юњф_X)` at the class `W` inverted by sheafification,
and Mathlib's `CategoryTheory.Localization.Monoidal.LocalizedMonoidal L W ╬х` equips that
localization with a symmetric monoidal structure for free (pentagon/triangle/hexagon), provided
`W` is a *monoidal* morphism class.  We discharge that single precondition (`W_isMonoidal`) and
instantiate the synonym (`modulesLocalizedMonoidal`).

The monoidal structure on the presheaf side `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj` is only found
by instance resolution under the syntactic form `MonoidalPresheaf X`
(`= PresheafOfModules (X.sheaf.obj РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)`, definitionally equal); we
therefore phrase the localization data with the domain ascribed to `MonoidalPresheaf X`. -/

/-- A morphism property `W` on a braided monoidal category is monoidal as soon as it is
multiplicative, respects isomorphisms, and is stable under right whiskering: left-whiskering
stability follows by conjugating with the braiding (`X РЌЂ g = ╬▓ РЅФ (g Рќи X) РЅФ ╬▓РЂ╗┬╣`).  Project-local:
it packages the `whiskerLeft`-from-`whiskerRight` reduction the blueprint prescribes for
`def:W_isMonoidal`. -/
private lemma isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight {C : Type*} [Category C] [MonoidalCategory C]
    [BraidedCategory C] (W : MorphismProperty C) [W.IsMultiplicative] [W.RespectsIso]
    (hwr : Рѕђ {XРѓЂ XРѓѓ : C} (f : XРѓЂ РЪХ XРѓѓ), W f Рєњ Рѕђ Y, W (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight f Y)) :
    W.IsMonoidal where
  whiskerRight f hf Y := hwr f hf Y
  whiskerLeft X YРѓЂ YРѓѓ g hg := by
    have hn := CategoryTheory.BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_right X g
    have heq : MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft X g
        = (╬▓_ X YРѓЂ).hom РЅФ (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight g X) РЅФ (╬▓_ X YРѓѓ).inv := by
      rw [Рєљ Category.assoc, Рєљ hn, Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id, Category.comp_id]
    rw [heq]
    exact MorphismProperty.RespectsIso.precomp W (╬▓_ X YРѓЂ).hom _
      (MorphismProperty.RespectsIso.postcomp W (╬▓_ X YРѓѓ).inv _ (hwr g hg X))

/-- The presheaf symmetric monoidal structure, transported to the *syntactic* form
`PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj` (the domain of the module sheafification functor).  Mathlib
provides `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` only for the form
`PresheafOfModules (R РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)` (here `MonoidalPresheaf X`), which is
*definitionally* equal but not found by instance synthesis on the bare form; this re-export makes
it synthesizable so `CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal` can be instantiated on the sheafification
functor's literal domain. -/
private noncomputable instance pshModMonoidal :
    MonoidalCategory (_root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} X.ringCatSheaf.obj) :=
  inferInstanceAs (MonoidalCategory (MonoidalPresheaf X))

/-- The presheaf braiding, transported to the syntactic bare form (see `pshModMonoidal`). -/
private noncomputable instance pshModBraided :
    BraidedCategory (_root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} X.ringCatSheaf.obj) :=
  inferInstanceAs (BraidedCategory (MonoidalPresheaf X))

/-- The presheaf symmetry, transported to the syntactic bare form (see `pshModMonoidal`). -/
private noncomputable instance pshModSymmetric :
    SymmetricCategory (_root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} X.ringCatSheaf.obj) :=
  inferInstanceAs (SymmetricCategory (MonoidalPresheaf X))

/-- The sheafification localization class as a morphism property of the presheaf-of-modules
category: a morphism lies in `W` iff its underlying abelian-presheaf morphism is a local
isomorphism for the opens topology.  This is the class `W` of `def:W_isMonoidal`. -/
private abbrev Wsheaf (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    MorphismProperty (_root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} X.ringCatSheaf.obj) :=
  (opensTopology X).W.inverseImage (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj)

/-- **The sheafification class is monoidal** (`def:W_isMonoidal`): the class `W` of presheaf-of-module
morphisms inverted by sheafification is multiplicative and stable under whiskering on both sides.
Right-whiskering stability is the proved `ztensor_whisker_localIso`; left-whiskering follows by
braiding conjugation (`isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight`); multiplicativity and iso-respect are
inherited from the local-isomorphism class through `inverseImage`.  This is the single new
precondition for the Mathlib monoidal-localization machinery. -/
instance W_isMonoidal : (Wsheaf X).IsMonoidal :=
  isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight (Wsheaf X) <| fun f hf R =>
    ztensor_whisker_localIso f hf R

/-- **Unit comparison for the localized monoidal structure** (`def:localizedMonoidalUnitIso`):
the sheafification of the presheaf monoidal unit `­ЮЪЎ_(PshMod)` is the unit module `­ЮЪЎ_X`.  Since the
underlying presheaf of `unitModule X` is *definitionally* the presheaf monoidal unit, this is just
the reflective sheafification counit iso.  It is the datum `╬х` instantiating
`CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal`. -/
noncomputable def localizedMonoidalUnitIso (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).obj
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) РЅЁ unitModule X :=
  sheafificationCounitIso (unitModule X)

/-- **The localized symmetric monoidal structure on the sheaves of modules**
(`def:modulesLocalizedMonoidal`): the Mathlib type synonym
`CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal L W ╬х` of `X.Modules`, with `L` module sheafification, `W` the
sheafification class (monoidal by `W_isMonoidal`, a localization by the Mathlib instance), and `╬х`
the unit comparison.  It carries a symmetric monoidal category structure (pentagon, triangle,
hexagon for free) by the Mathlib monoidal-localization machinery, deliberately on the synonym so
it never clashes with structure on `X.Modules` itself. -/
noncomputable abbrev modulesLocalizedMonoidal (X : Scheme.{u}) : Type (u + 1) :=
  LocalizedMonoidal (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
    (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)

/-! ### Lax-monoidal global sections via the localized monoidal structure
(`sec:sgr_lax_sections`, `lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal`)

The global-sections functor `╬Њ(X,-)` factors as the forgetful functor
`╬╣ = toPresheafOfModules : X.Modules РЦц X.PresheafOfModules` followed by evaluation of the
underlying presheaf at the top open.  `╬╣` is the **right adjoint** of the monoidal localization
functor `L' = toMonoidalCategory` onto the localized symmetric monoidal structure
`modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` (`W_isMonoidal`, the Mathlib monoidal-localization machinery).
By `CategoryTheory.Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`, a right adjoint of an (op)lax monoidal
functor is **lax monoidal**; hence `╬╣` is lax monoidal, with all coherence (pentagon, triangle,
hexagon) discharged abstractly by the library laws Рђћ **no object-level coherence on `X.Modules`
is verified by hand.**  This is the route of `lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal` that replaces the
off-path object pentagon `tensorObjAssoc`/`tensorPowAdd_assoc`. -/

/-- The monoidal localization functor `L' = toMonoidalCategory` from presheaves of modules onto the
localized symmetric monoidal synonym `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X`.  It is `sheafification`
(definitionally, `toMonoidalCategory L W ╬х := L`), promoted to a **strong monoidal** functor by the
Mathlib monoidal-localization machinery (using `W_isMonoidal`).  Project-local: the source object
of the `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal` construction for the lax-monoidal global sections. -/
noncomputable def localizedSheafification (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    X.PresheafOfModules РЦц modulesLocalizedMonoidal X :=
  Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
    (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)

noncomputable instance (X : Scheme.{u}) : (localizedSheafification X).Monoidal := by
  unfold localizedSheafification; infer_instance

noncomputable instance (X : Scheme.{u}) : (localizedSheafification X).OplaxMonoidal := by
  unfold localizedSheafification; infer_instance

/-- The forgetful functor `╬╣ = toPresheafOfModules`, regarded as a functor **out of** the localized
monoidal synonym `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` (definitionally `X.Modules`).  It is the right adjoint
of `localizedSheafification`; the underlying presheaf evaluated at the top open recovers global
sections `╬Њ(X,-)`.  Project-local: the right-adjoint object of the `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`
construction. -/
noncomputable def toPresheafLocalized (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    modulesLocalizedMonoidal X РЦц X.PresheafOfModules :=
  toPresheafOfModules X

/-- The sheafification adjunction `L' РіБ ╬╣`, retyped onto the localized monoidal synonym (it is
`PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction` verbatim, since `toMonoidalCategory L W ╬х := L` and the
synonym shares the category structure of `X.Modules`).  Project-local: feeds
`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`. -/
noncomputable def localizedSheafificationAdjunction (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    localizedSheafification X РіБ toPresheafLocalized X :=
  PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)

/-- **The forgetful functor `╬╣ = toPresheafOfModules` is lax monoidal** (core of
`lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal`): as the right adjoint of the strong-monoidal localization
functor `localizedSheafification`, it is lax monoidal by
`CategoryTheory.Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`.
Its tensorator `╬╝^╬╣_{F,G} : ╬╣ F РіЌРѓџ ╬╣ G Рєњ ╬╣ (F РіЌ_loc G)` is the adjunction transpose
`adj.homEquiv (╬┤_{L'} РЅФ (╬х РіЌ ╬х))`, i.e. the top-open value is the section multiplication
`sectionsMul` post-composed with `╬Њ` of the object identification `tensorObjLocalizedIso`
(the bridge between the hand-built `tensorObj` and the localized `РіЌ_loc`).  All graded coherence
(`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`, Рђд) is then the corresponding **library** lax-monoidal law applied to this
functor Рђћ the object pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc` is bypassed. -/
noncomputable instance toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    (toPresheafLocalized X).LaxMonoidal :=
  (localizedSheafificationAdjunction X).rightAdjointLaxMonoidal

/-- **Object identification: hand-built versus localized tensor** (`def:tensorObjLocalizedIso`).
The object-identification isomorphism `i_{F,G} : F РіЌ G РЅЁ F РіЌ_loc G` between the hand-built sheaf
tensor product `tensorObj` (`def:sheafTensorObj`) and the localized monoidal tensor product of
`modulesLocalizedMonoidal X`.  It is the composite `╬╝РЂ╗┬╣_{F^РЎГ,G^РЎГ} РЅФ (c_F РіЌ_loc c_G)`, where `╬╝`
is the Mathlib strong-monoidality comparison of the monoidal localization
(`Localization.Monoidal.╬╝`) at the underlying presheaves and `c_F = sheafificationCounitIso F`
is the reflective sheafification counit iso.  This is the identification all four bridge lemmas
thread through (Option B of `sec:sgr_localized_monoidal`). -/
noncomputable def tensorObjLocalizedIso (F G : X.Modules) :
    tensorObj F G РЅЁ
      MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (F : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) (G : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) :=
  (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
      (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).symm РЅфРЅФ
    MonoidalCategory.tensorIso (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
      (sheafificationCounitIso F) (sheafificationCounitIso G)

/-- Right-whiskering of a sheaf-level isomorphism by a sheaf of modules: given
`e : F РЅЁ F'`, the isomorphism `F РіЌ G РЅЁ F' РіЌ G` of sheaf tensor products, obtained
by sheafifying the presheaf-level right-whiskering (`whiskerRightIso`) of the
underlying presheaf isomorphism `(toPresheafOfModules X).mapIso e`.  Pure
sheafification-functoriality Рђћ no monoidal structure on `X.Modules` needed.
Used for step (d) of `tensorPowAdd` (whiskering the inductive hypothesis by `L`). -/
private noncomputable def tensorObjWhiskerRightIso {F F' : X.Modules} (e : F РЅЁ F')
    (G : X.Modules) : tensorObj F G РЅЁ tensorObj F' G where
  hom := sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))
  inv := sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))
  hom_inv_id := by
    -- term-mode congruence (positional rw cannot fire under the Scheme-cat diamond)
    have hcomp : (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom РЅФ (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv
        = ­ЮЪЎ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) :=
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).map_comp e.hom e.inv).symm.trans
        ((congrArg (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom_inv_id).trans
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map_id F))
    have hw : MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) РЅФ
        MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)
        = ­ЮЪЎ (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) :=
      (MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight _ _ _).symm.trans
        ((congrArg (fun t => MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) t
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) hcomp).trans
          (MonoidalCategory.id_whiskerRight _ _))
    exact (sheafification.map_comp _ _).symm.trans
      ((congrArg sheafification.map hw).trans (sheafification.map_id _))
  inv_hom_id := by
    have hcomp : (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv РЅФ (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom
        = ­ЮЪЎ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F') :=
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).map_comp e.inv e.hom).symm.trans
        ((congrArg (toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv_hom_id).trans
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map_id F'))
    have hw : MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.inv) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) РЅФ
        MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)
        = ­ЮЪЎ (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F') ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) :=
      (MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight _ _ _).symm.trans
        ((congrArg (fun t => MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) t
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) hcomp).trans
          (MonoidalCategory.id_whiskerRight _ _))
    exact (sheafification.map_comp _ _).symm.trans
      ((congrArg sheafification.map hw).trans (sheafification.map_id _))

/-- Left-whiskering of a sheaf-level isomorphism by a sheaf of modules: given
`e : G РЅЁ G'`, the isomorphism `F РіЌ G РЅЁ F РіЌ G'` of sheaf tensor products, obtained
by sheafifying the presheaf-level left-whiskering (`whiskerLeftIso`) of the
underlying presheaf isomorphism.  Used for step (b) of `tensorPowAdd` (braiding
the inner factor under the fixed left factor `L^РіЌk`). -/
private noncomputable def tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (F : X.Modules) {G G' : X.Modules}
    (e : G РЅЁ G') : tensorObj F G РЅЁ tensorObj F G' :=
  sheafification.mapIso
    (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).mapIso e))

/- Planner strategy for `tensorPowAdd` (`lem:sheafTensorPow_add`, blueprint L1158РђЊL1243):

INDUCTION ON m (blueprint proof block L1186РђЊL1222):

BASE CASE (m = 0):
  tensorObj (tensorPow L 0) (tensorPow L m')
    = tensorObj (unitModule X) (tensorPow L m')   [by tensorPow_zero]
  Iso: tensorObjUnitIso (tensorPow L m') РЅфРЅФ eqToIso (by simp [Nat.zero_add])

INDUCTIVE STEP (m = k+1, IH : tensorObj (tensorPow L k) (tensorPow L m') РЅЁ tensorPow L (k+m')):
  tensorObj (tensorPow L (k+1)) (tensorPow L m')
    = tensorObj (tensorObj (tensorPow L k) L) (tensorPow L m')   [by tensorPow_succ]

  Step (a) Рђћ ASSOCIATOR (left-to-right):
    tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L k) L (tensorPow L m')
    gives tensorObj (tensorPow L k) (tensorObj L (tensorPow L m'))

  Step (b) Рђћ BRAIDING on the inner factor:
    sheafification.mapIso
      (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorPow L m')))
    OR equivalently `tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L m')` (already in file, private),
    whiskered to act on the right factor of tensorPow L k.
    After this: tensorObj (tensorPow L k) (tensorObj (tensorPow L m') L).

  Step (c) Рђћ INVERSE ASSOCIATOR:
    (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L k) (tensorPow L m') L).symm
    gives tensorObj (tensorObj (tensorPow L k) (tensorPow L m')) L.

  Step (d) Рђћ WHISKER IH BY L ON THE RIGHT:
    Need tensorObj (tensorPow L (k + m')) L РЅЁ tensorPow L ((k+m')+1).
    Since tensorPow L ((k+m')+1) = tensorObj (tensorPow L (k+m')) L (by tensorPow_succ),
    this is just `Iso.refl _` (or `eqToIso rfl`).
    The IH itself: sheafification.mapIso applied to
        MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          <presheaf-level map lifting IH> ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)
    Рђћ but IH is a sheaf-level iso, so lifting to presheaf level is non-trivial.
    ALTERNATIVE: define the sheaf-level whiskering endofunctor
        fun F => tensorObj F L
    as a Lean Functor and apply `Functor.mapIso` to IH; or use `Iso.mk` building hom/inv
    from the presheaf-level morphisms obtained from IH.hom/IH.inv via
        sheafification.map (whiskerRight ((toPresheafOfModules X).map IH.hom) (toPresheaf L))
    (here (toPresheafOfModules X).map : X.Modules РЦц X.PresheafOfModules is the right adjoint,
    already called `toPresheafOfModules X`).

  Step (e) Рђћ REINDEX:
    eqToIso (by omega : (k + m') + 1 = (k + 1) + m')   [Nat.succ_add]
    composes on the target to land in tensorPow L ((k+1) + m').

IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: Lean's `Nat.rec` for РёЋ-indexed Iso families works cleanly as a
  `match m with | 0 => ... | k+1 => ...` in a `noncomputable def`.  The `eqToIso` steps are
  the index-bookkeeping glue; `omega` closes all arithmetic goals.

CARRIER IDIOMS (same as tensorObjAssoc above; additionally):
  Рђб `tensorPow_zero`/`tensorPow_succ` are `@[simp] private lemma`s in this file; use them
    via `rw [tensorPow_succ]` or `show ... = tensorObj ... ...` to unfold.
  Рђб Step (d)'s sheaf-level right-whisker: verify `(toPresheafOfModules X).map` exists
    (it is the forgetful `SheafOfModules Рєњ PresheafOfModules` functor) before using it.
  Рђб If `(toPresheafOfModules X).map IH.hom` causes universe issues, build the inner
    morphism at the presheaf level directly from the sorry body using `sheafification.map`.
-/
/-- The tensor-power comparison isomorphism `L^РіЌm РіЌ L^РіЌm' РЅЁ L^РіЌ(m+m')` for the sheaf tensor
power `tensorPow` (`lem:sheafTensorPow_add`, [Stacks, Tag 01CU]).

Proof by induction on `m`: the base case `m = 0` uses the left-unitor `tensorObjUnitIso`
(already in file, axiom-clean); the inductive step uses `tensorObjAssoc` (above), the braiding
`tensorBraiding` (in file), and sheaf-level right-whiskering of the inductive hypothesis.
See the planner strategy comment above for the step-by-step construction and carrier-idiom
checklist. -/
noncomputable def tensorPowAdd (L : X.Modules) (m m' : РёЋ) :
    tensorObj (tensorPow L m) (tensorPow L m') РЅЁ tensorPow L (m + m') :=
  match m with
  | 0 =>
    -- Base case: the left unitor, reindexed along `0 + m' = m'`.
    tensorObjUnitIso (tensorPow L m') РЅфРЅФ
      eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (Nat.zero_add m').symm)
  | (k + 1) =>
    -- (a) associator, (b) braiding under the left factor, (c) inverse associator,
    -- (d) inductive hypothesis whiskered by `L` on the right, (e) reindexing.
    tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L k) L (tensorPow L m') РЅфРЅФ
      tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L k) (tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L m')) РЅфРЅФ
      (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L k) (tensorPow L m') L).symm РЅфРЅФ
      tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L k m') L РЅфРЅФ
      eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (Nat.succ_add k m').symm)

/-! ### Bridge lemmas: hand-built isomorphisms versus the localized monoidal structure

Option B of `sec:sgr_localized_monoidal`: each hand-built structural iso of the sheaf tensor
product is the corresponding iso of `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` conjugated by the object
identification `tensorObjLocalizedIso`.  The proofs expand both sides via the Mathlib component
formulas (`Localization.Monoidal.{╬╝_natural_left,╬╝_natural_right,braidingNatIso_hom_app,
leftUnitor_hom_app,rightUnitor_hom_app,associator_hom_app}`) and cancel the `╬╝`'s. -/

/-- The lax-monoidal structure map of the localization functor `L'` is the `hom` of the
strong-monoidality comparison `Localization.Monoidal.╬╝`.  Definitional repackaging. -/
private lemma laxMonoidal_╬╝_eq (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
        (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)) P Q
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
          (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).hom := rfl

/-- The oplax-monoidal structure map of the localization functor `L'` is the `inv` of the
strong-monoidality comparison `Localization.Monoidal.╬╝`.  Definitional repackaging. -/
private lemma oplaxMonoidal_╬┤_eq (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
        (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)) P Q
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
          (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).inv := rfl

/-- **Tensorator gate** (`lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal`, the `╬╝_╬Њ = sectionsMul` coincidence,
STEP-0 gate): the lax-monoidal tensorator `╬╝^╬╣_{F,G}` of `╬╣ = toPresheafLocalized` (the
right-adjoint lax structure built by `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`) is the sheafification unit at
`╬╣ F РіЌРѓџ ╬╣ G` post-composed with `╬╣` of the object identification `tensorObjLocalizedIso`.  Taking
the top-open value, `╬╝^╬╣_{F,G}|_Ріц = sectionsMul(F,G) РЅФ ╬Њ((tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom)`: the
tensorator is **not** definitionally `sectionsMul`, but coincides with it up to the hand-built Рєћ
localized object identification.  This is the precise gate outcome that connects the library
lax-monoidal coherence of `╬╣` to the section multiplication.  Proof: unfold the
`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal` tensorator to the transpose `homEquiv (╬┤ РЅФ (╬х РіЌ ╬х))`, peel the common
adjunction unit, and identify `╬┤ РЅФ (╬х РіЌ ╬х)` with `(tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom` via
`oplaxMonoidal_╬┤_eq` (╬┤ = ╬╝РЂ╗┬╣) and the counit iso. -/
lemma sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator (F G : X.Modules) :
    Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (toPresheafLocalized X) F G
      = (localizedSheafificationAdjunction X).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) РЅФ
        (toPresheafLocalized X).map (tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom := by
  rw [toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal, Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_╬╝,
      Adjunction.homEquiv_apply]
  congr 1

/-- **Bridge: the hand-built braiding is the localized braiding**
(`lem:tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding`).  The hand-built braiding `tensorBraiding F G` equals
the localized braiding `╬▓^loc_{F,G}` conjugated by the object identifications
`tensorObjLocalizedIso` on both tensor slots.  Proof: substitute the definition of
`tensorObjLocalizedIso`, move `╬▓^loc` across the counit tensor by `braiding_naturality`, cancel the
counits, expand `╬▓^loc` at `L'`-objects by `braidingNatIso_hom_app`, and cancel the `╬╝`'s. -/
lemma tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding (F G : X.Modules) :
    (@BraidedCategory.braiding (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) _ _ _ F G)
      = (tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).symm РЅфРЅФ tensorBraiding F G РЅфРЅФ
          tensorObjLocalizedIso G F := by
  -- Rewrite the hand-built braiding to the defeq localized `L'.mapIso (╬▓^p)`, so the whole RHS
  -- iso is typed in the localized category and `Iso.ext` produces localized compositions.
  rw [show tensorBraiding F G
      = (Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules.sheafification
          (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).mapIso
          (╬▓_ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) from rfl]
  apply Iso.ext
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv, tensorObjLocalizedIso,
    MonoidalCategory.tensorIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.tensorIso_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
    Functor.mapIso_hom]
  -- Naturality of the localized braiding `╬▓^loc` along the counit isos `c_F, c_G` reduces the
  -- general-object braiding to the `L'`-object one, whose Mathlib formula `╬▓_hom_app` is
  -- `╬╝ РЅФ L'(╬▓^p) РЅФ ╬╝РЂ╗┬╣` (lax/oplax structure maps recognised as `╬╝.hom`/`╬╝.inv`).  Keeping the
  -- rewrite inside `hnat` avoids the `X.Modules`-vs-`LocalizedMonoidal` composition-instance clash.
  have hnat := BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
    (sheafificationCounitIso F).hom (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom
  erw [Localization.Monoidal.╬▓_hom_app (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
      (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)] at hnat
  rw [laxMonoidal_╬╝_eq, oplaxMonoidal_╬┤_eq] at hnat
  -- Solve `hnat` for `╬▓^loc_{F,G}` in *uniform* `LocalizedMonoidal` composition flavor (`key`):
  -- cancel the epi `c_F РіЌ c_G` and collapse `(cРіЌc) РЅФ (cРЂ╗┬╣РіЌcРЂ╗┬╣) = ­ЮЪЎ`.  Then close the goal by
  -- `exact key` Рђћ definitional equality bridges the `X.Modules`-vs-`LocalizedMonoidal` comp clash.
  have key : (@BraidedCategory.braiding (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) _ _ _ F G).hom =
      MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (sheafificationCounitIso F).inv (sheafificationCounitIso G).inv РЅФ
        (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom РЅФ
        (Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules.sheafification
            (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
          (╬▓_ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom РЅФ
        (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F)).inv РЅФ
        MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom (sheafificationCounitIso F).hom := by
    rw [Рєљ cancel_epi (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (sheafificationCounitIso F).hom (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom), hnat]
    letI mc : MonoidalCategory (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) := inferInstance
    -- Thread the monoidal-category instance `mc` explicitly into `tensorIso`: re-synthesising
    -- `MonoidalCategory (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)` inside the large `exact` term fails, while
    -- the already-found `mc` discharges it deterministically.
    exact ((@MonoidalCategory.tensorIso (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) _ mc _ _ _ _
      (sheafificationCounitIso F) (sheafificationCounitIso G)).hom_inv_id_assoc _).symm
  exact key

/-- **Bridge: the hand-built left unitor is the localized left unitor**
(`lem:tensorObjUnitor_eq_localized`).  The hand-built left unitor `╬╗_G = tensorObjUnitIso G`
(`def:tensorObjUnitIso`) equals the localized left unitor `╬╗^loc_G` precomposed with the object
identification `i_{­ЮЪЎ,G} = tensorObjLocalizedIso (unitModule X) G`.  Proof: `leftUnitor` naturality
along the counit `c_G` reduces to `G = (GРЎГ)^#`, where the Mathlib component formula
`leftUnitor_hom_app` gives `╬╗^loc_{L'GРЎГ} = (╬хРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ) ; ╬╝_{­ЮЪЎ,GРЎГ} ; L'(╬╗^p_{GРЎГ})`; the `╬х`/`╬хРЂ╗┬╣`
whisker collapses and the `╬╝`-pair (the one in `iРЂ╗┬╣` and the one from the formula, both at
`(­ЮЪЎ_psh, GРЎГ)`) cancels, leaving `L'(╬╗^p_{GРЎГ}) ; c_G`, which is exactly `(tensorObjUnitIso G).hom`. -/
lemma tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor (G : X.Modules) :
    tensorObjUnitIso G
      = tensorObjLocalizedIso (unitModule X) G РЅфРЅФ
          MonoidalCategoryStruct.leftUnitor (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            (G : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) := by
  apply Iso.ext
  -- Expose both sides: `hand.hom = i.hom РЅФ ╬╗^loc_G.hom`; flip + `Iso.eq_inv_comp` isolates the
  -- localized unitor `(╬╗_G).hom = (cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ РіЌ c_GРЂ╗┬╣) РЅФ ╬╝_{­ЮЪЎРЎГ,GРЎГ} РЅФ L'(╬╗^p_{GРЎГ}) РЅФ c_G`.
  rw [Iso.trans_hom]
  symm
  rw [Рєљ Iso.eq_inv_comp]
  simp only [tensorObjUnitIso, tensorObjLocalizedIso, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
    Functor.mapIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.tensorIso_inv, Category.assoc]
  -- `╬╗^loc` is only computable at an `L'`-object, so cancel the counit `c_G` by whiskering on the
  -- left (`cancel_epi (­ЮЪЎ РЌЂ c_G)`) and pull it through by `leftUnitor_naturality`; then the Mathlib
  -- component formula `leftUnitor_hom_app` rewrites `╬╗^loc_{L'GРЎГ} = (╬хРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи) РЅФ ╬╝ РЅФ L'(╬╗^p)`.
  apply (cancel_epi (MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
    (unitModule X) (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom)).1
  erw [MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_naturality (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
      (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom,
    Localization.Monoidal.leftUnitor_hom_app (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
      (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)]
  -- `╬х = localizedMonoidalUnitIso X = sheafificationCounitIso (unitModule X) = cРѓЂ` (definitional).
  -- Split the counit tensor `cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ РіЌ c_GРЂ╗┬╣`, exchange the whiskers so the `c_G`/`c_GРЂ╗┬╣` pair meets and
  -- cancels, leaving `(cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ) РЅФ ╬╝_{­ЮЪЎРЎГ,GРЎГ}` on both sides (the two `╬╝`'s agree definitionally).
  -- `╬х = cРѓЂ` (definitional); rewrite `­ЮЪЎ РЌЂ c_G = ­ЮЪЎ РіЌРѓў c_G`, then the interchange `tensor_comp` merges
  -- `(­ЮЪЎ РіЌ c_G) РЅФ (cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ РіЌ c_GРЂ╗┬╣) = (­ЮЪЎ РЅФ cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣) РіЌ (c_G РЅФ c_GРЂ╗┬╣) = cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ РіЌ ­ЮЪЎ = cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ`; both sides
  -- reduce to `(cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ) РЅФ ╬╝ РЅФ L'(╬╗^p) РЅФ c_G` (the two `╬╝`'s agree definitionally).
  simp only [Localization.Monoidal.╬х', localizedMonoidalUnitIso, Рєљ MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom]
  -- The merge straddles the `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` Рєћ `LocalizedMonoidal` comp-instance boundary
  -- (defeq-not-syntactic), so the interchange + iso-cancel chain fires via `erw` (reducible
  -- transparency) rather than `rw`.  Both sides land on `(cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ) РЅФ ╬╝ РЅФ L'(╬╗^p) РЅФ c_G`.
  erw [MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom_assoc, Category.id_comp, Iso.hom_inv_id,
    MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_id]
  -- Both sides are now `(cРѓЂРЂ╗┬╣ Рќи L'GРЎГ) РЅФ ╬╝ РЅФ L'(╬╗^p) РЅФ c_G`, equal up to associativity grouping and
  -- the definitional spellings `toMonoidalCategory = sheafification`, `­ЮЪЎ_psh = (unitModule X)РЎГ`.
  rfl

/-! ### Associator bridge seams (`lem:tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`)

The hand-built associator `tensorObjAssoc` is a five-segment composite (segment 1 = inverse
whiskered unit, segment 2 = sheafified presheaf associator, segments 3РђЊ5 = braiding-conjugated
whiskered unit).  We isolate its mathematical content in four seam lemmas: the seg-2 defeq
(`sheafification_mapIso_associator_eq_localizationMap`), the two keystones identifying a sheafified
whiskered unit with a `╬╝` component (`sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu` via `╬╝_natural_left`,
`sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu` via `╬╝_natural_right`), and the braiding-conjugation
collapse of segments 3РђЊ5 (`sheafification_braiding_whiskerRight_unit_eq_whiskerLeft_unit`). -/

/-- **Seam (segment 2): the sheafified presheaf associator is the localization image of the
presheaf associator** (`lem:sheafificationMapIso_assoc_eq_localized`).  The localization functor
`L' = toMonoidalCategory` is, by construction, sheafification on morphisms, so `L'(╬▒^p)` is
definitionally `(╬▒^p)^#`; the equality holds by reflexivity. -/
lemma sheafification_mapIso_associator_eq_localizationMap (P Q R : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    (sheafification.mapIso (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) P Q R)).hom
      = (Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
          (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
          (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) P Q R).hom := rfl

/-- **Keystone: the sheafified right-whiskered unit is a `╬╝` component** (via `╬╝_natural_left`,
`lem:whiskeredUnit_eq_localizationMu`).  For presheaves `P, Q`, the sheafified right-whiskered unit
`(╬и_P Рќи Q)^#` equals the `╬╝`-conjugate of the localized right-whiskering of the sheafified unit:
`(╬и_P Рќи Q)^# = ╬╝_{P,Q}РЂ╗┬╣ ; ((╬и_P)^# Рќи_loc Q^#) ; ╬╝_{P^РЎГ,Q}`. -/
lemma sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P) Q)
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).inv РЅФ
          MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P))
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj Q) РЅФ
          (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) _ Q).hom := by
  simp only [CategoryTheory.Functor.id_obj]
  rw [Localization.Monoidal.╬╝_natural_left, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]
  rfl

/-- **Keystone variant: the sheafified left-whiskered unit is a `╬╝` component** (via
`╬╝_natural_right`, `lem:whiskeredUnitLeft_eq_localizationMu`).  For presheaves `P, Q`, the
sheafified left-whiskered unit `(P РЌЂ ╬и_Q)^#` equals the `╬╝`-conjugate of the localized
left-whiskering of the sheafified unit:
`(P РЌЂ ╬и_Q)^# = ╬╝_{P,Q}РЂ╗┬╣ ; (P^# РЌЂ_loc (╬и_Q)^#) ; ╬╝_{P,Q^РЎГ}`. -/
lemma sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) P
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q))
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).inv РЅФ
          MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj P)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q)) РЅФ
          (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P _).hom := by
  simp only [CategoryTheory.Functor.id_obj]
  rw [Localization.Monoidal.╬╝_natural_right, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]
  rfl

/-- **Canonical right keystone** (`lem:whiskeredUnit_eq_localizationMu_canonical`): the
right-whiskered keystone `sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu` restated with the trailing
`╬╝`'s first object argument pinned to the counit-object form
`(toPresheafOfModules X).obj (sheafification.obj P)` (= `(P^#)^РЎГ`) exactly as in
`tensorObjLocalizedIso`, so the two `╬╝` occurrences in the associator bridge become the
syntactically same comparison and cancel.  Mathematically identical to the unprimed keystone;
the restatement only fixes the representation of the comparison's object. -/
lemma sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu' (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P) Q)
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).inv РЅФ
          MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P))
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj Q) РЅФ
          (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (sheafification.obj P)) Q).hom :=
  sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu P Q

/-- **Canonical left keystone** (`lem:whiskeredUnitLeft_eq_localizationMu_canonical`): the
left-whiskered keystone `sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu` restated with the trailing
`╬╝`'s second object argument pinned to the counit-object form
`(toPresheafOfModules X).obj (sheafification.obj Q)` (= `(Q^#)^РЎГ`) exactly as in
`tensorObjLocalizedIso`.  Mathematically identical to the unprimed keystone. -/
lemma sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu' (P Q : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) P
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q))
      = (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P Q).inv РЅФ
          MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj P)
            ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
              (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
              (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q)) РЅФ
          (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
            (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) P
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (sheafification.obj Q))).hom :=
  sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu P Q

/-- **Seam (braiding conjugation realises the left-whiskered unit)**
(`lem:sheafification_braidingConj_whiskerRightUnit`).  At the presheaf level, naturality of the
braiding in its right argument is the braided-category identity
`A РЌЂ ╬и_P = ╬▓_{A,P} ; (╬и_P Рќи A) ; ╬▓_{P^РЎГ,A}`; sheafification preserves composition. -/
lemma sheafification_braiding_whiskerRight_unit_eq_whiskerLeft_unit (A P : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) A P).hom РЅФ
        sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P) A) РЅФ
        sheafification.map (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) A _).inv
      = sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) A
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P)) := by
  rw [Рєљ sheafification.map_comp, Рєљ sheafification.map_comp]
  congr 1
  -- Presheaf-level: `╬▓_{A,P} ; (╬и_P Рќи A) ; ╬▓_{A,P^РЎГ}РЂ╗┬╣ = A РЌЂ ╬и_P` by right-argument braiding
  -- naturality (`braiding_naturality_right`).
  have hn := BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_right (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) A
    ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P)
  rw [Рєљ Category.assoc, Iso.comp_inv_eq]
  exact hn.symm

/-- **The common form `K` of the associator bridge** (the meeting point of the two
half-assemblies `hK_lhs`/`hK_rhs`, blueprint `K` of `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`).
Well-typed Lean realisation of the blueprint schematic
`K = L'(╬▒^p) ; ╬╝РЂ╗┬╣ ; (L'a РЌЂ ╬╝РЂ╗┬╣) ; (c_A РіЌ (c_B РіЌ c_C))`, prefixed by the inverse segment-1
whiskered unit `(L'(╬и_{aРіЌb} Рќи c))РЂ╗┬╣` so the domain is the assembly domain
`tensorObj (tensorObj A B) C` (the schematic core's domain `L'((aРіЌb)РіЌc)` differs by exactly this
unit Рђћ the "counit object-glue on the 4 tensor slots" the plan flags).  Its five factors:
inverse segment-1 unit, `L'(╬▒^p)`, `╬╝РЂ╗┬╣_{a,bРіЌc}`, `(L'a РЌЂ ╬╝РЂ╗┬╣_{b,c})`, and
`(c_A РіЌ (c_B РіЌ c_C))`. -/
private noncomputable def assocCommonForm (A B C : X.Modules) :
    tensorObj (tensorObj A B) C РЪХ
      MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (A : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (B : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) (C : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)) :=
  (@asIso _ _ _ _
      (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))
      (isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))).inv РЅФ
    sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).hom РЅФ
    (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
      (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
      (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))).inv РЅФ
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
      ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
        (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A))
      (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
        (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).inv РЅФ
    MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
      (sheafificationCounitIso A).hom
      (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (sheafificationCounitIso B).hom (sheafificationCounitIso C).hom)

/-- Adjunction triangle in sheafified form: `L'(╬и_P) РЅФ c_{L'P} = ­ЮЪЎ`, where `c` is the reflective
counit iso `sheafificationCounitIso`.  This is `Adjunction.left_triangle_components` with the counit
written through `sheafificationCounitIso` (defeq), used to collapse the whisker head of `hK_lhs`. -/
private lemma sheafification_map_unit_comp_counitIso_hom (P : X.PresheafOfModules) :
    sheafification.map ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P) РЅФ
        (sheafification.obj P).sheafificationCounitIso.hom
      = ­ЮЪЎ (sheafification.obj P) := by
  simp only [sheafificationCounitIso]
  exact (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).left_triangle_components P

/-- **Head reduction for the localized half-assembly** (`lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs`, recipe Step 5,
`analogies/snap-assoc-expose.md`).  The composite of the leading inverse-╬╝, the whiskered counit at
the composite object `AРіЌB`, and the ╬╝ at the presheaf tensor `AРЎГРіЌBРЎГ` collapses to the inverse of the

  -- the inner ╬╝.inv but NO surrounding outer ╬╝, so `Рєљ tensorHom_id`/`Рєљ tensor_comp` fire cleanly; the

              MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
                A.sheafificationCounitIso.hom B.sheafificationCounitIso.hom)
          C.sheafificationCounitIso.hom
        = MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerRight (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            ((A.tensorObj B).sheafificationCounitIso.hom РЅФ

                  (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)).inv)
            (sheafification.obj ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)) РЅФ
          MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
            (MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
              A.sheafificationCounitIso.hom B.sheafificationCounitIso.hom)
            C.sheafificationCounitIso.hom := by

    congr 1 <;> first | exact (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm | exact (Category.id_comp _).symm
  refine (congrArg (fun t =>
      (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
        (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (A.tensorObj B))

  -- iter-017 STATE: step (a) is DONE and cold-build GREEN.  Goal is now

  -- with `W = (c_{AРіЌB} РЅФ ╬╝_{AРЎГ,BРЎГ}.inv) Рќи L'CРЎГ`, `T = (c_AРіЌРѓўc_B)РіЌРѓўc_C`.  The next recipe move is the
  -- reassociation `(W РЅФ T) РЅФ ╬▒  Рєњ  W РЅФ (T РЅФ ╬▒)` so that `associator_naturality` (step b) can fire on
  -- `T РЅФ ╬▒` (VERIFIED in true isolation: `rw [Localization.Monoidal.associator_naturality,

/-- **Hand-built half-assembly of the associator bridge equals the common form**
(`lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_rhs`).  The hand-built side `╬▒ РЅФ ╬д^R` of the bridge equals the same common
form `K = assocCommonForm A B C`. -/
private lemma tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_rhs (A B C : X.Modules) :
    (tensorObjAssoc A B C).hom РЅФ
        (tensorObjLocalizedIso A (tensorObj B C)).hom РЅФ
        MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (A : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) (tensorObjLocalizedIso B C).hom
      = assocCommonForm A B C := by
  rw [tensorObjAssoc]
  simp only [tensorObjLocalizedIso, assocCommonForm, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom,
    Functor.mapIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.tensorIso_hom, asIso_hom, asIso_inv, Category.assoc]
  -- After unfolding both sides share the prefix `inv(map (╬и_{aРіЌb} Рќи c)) РЅФ map (╬▒^p) РЅФ Рђд`; strip
  -- it with two `congrArg`s, leaving the small tail (segments 3РђЊ5 vs `╬д^R`) as the obligation.
  refine congrArg (fun t => _ РЅФ t) ?_
  refine congrArg (fun t => _ РЅФ t) ?_
  -- Collapse the braiding-conjugated whiskered unit (segments 3РђЊ5) to `(A РЌЂ ╬и_{bРіЌc})^#`
  -- (`sheafification_braiding_whiskerRight_unit_eq_whiskerLeft_unit`, after the symmetric swap).
  have hcol : sheafification.map (╬▓_ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).hom РЅФ
      sheafification.map ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C) Рќи
          (toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) РЅФ
      sheafification.map (╬▓_ ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (B.tensorObj C))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)).hom =
      (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))) :
        _ РЪХ tensorObj A (tensorObj B C)) := by
    rw [SymmetricCategory.braiding_swap_eq_inv_braiding]
    exact sheafification_braiding_whiskerRight_unit_eq_whiskerLeft_unit _ _
  slice_lhs 1 3 => erw [hcol]
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  -- Rewrite `(A РЌЂ ╬и_{bРіЌc})^#` as a `╬╝`-conjugate (canonical left keystone); `erw` absorbs the
  -- `РЌЂ` instance-form mismatch (`MonoidalPresheaf X` vs the bare presheaf monoidal instance).
  erw [sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu' ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)]
  -- iter-013 DIAGNOSIS (the ╬╝-cancel blocker, now PRECISELY mechanized via isolated LSP probes).
  -- The keystone emits the grouped composite `(╬╝_{a,bc}.inv РЅФ (L'a РЌЂ L'╬и_{bc}) РЅФ ╬╝.hom)`
  -- whose INTERNAL `РЅФ` is the `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` (localized-synonym) `comp`, while
  -- the boundary `РЅФ ╬╝_{a,bc}.inv` from `tensorObjLocalizedIso` uses the `X.Modules` `comp`.
  -- After `simp only [tensorObj]` BOTH `╬╝` objects print identically (object-fold cleared).
  -- The two comps are DEFEQ but DISTINCT instances; the cancel `╬╝.hom РЅФ ╬╝.inv` never forms:
  --   Рђб `rw [Category.assoc]` / `simp only [Category.assoc]` find NO `(f РЅФ g) РЅФ h` Рђћ the mixed
  --     loc/syn `РЅФ` heads block the single-instance pattern (verified);
  --   Рђб a SINGLE `erw [Category.assoc]` DOES cross one boundary (defeq match, ╬╝ kept intact) and
  --     reassociates the outer `РЅФ`, but a SECOND `erw [Category.assoc]` UNFOLDS
  --     `Localization.Monoidal.╬╝` into its raw `Functor.curry.mapIso (Localization.fac Рђд)` form
  --     (verified) Рђћ catastrophic, not a cancel;
  --   Рђб after one crossing the keystone tail `(L'a РЌЂ L'╬и_{bc}) РЅФ_loc ╬╝.hom` is an ATOMIC
  --     `X.Modules`-factor (verified by `slice_lhs 2 3` grabbing it whole), so the buried `╬╝.hom`
  --     is unreachable for `Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc` / `slice Рђд Iso.hom_inv_id`.
  -- ACTIONABLE FIX (iter-013 idiom consult, per PROGRESS Queued): UNIFY the two comps. Cleanest
  -- is to RESTATE the keystone lemmas (`sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu'` /
  -- `РђдwhiskerRightРђд`) with the `X.Modules` synonym `comp` on their RHS (type-ascribe the localized
  -- whiskering/╬╝ composite to an `X.Modules` hom Рђћ defeq, so the proof body is unchanged), OR add a
  -- `@[simp]` rfl-lemma collapsing `@CategoryStruct.comp (modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)` to
  -- `@CategoryStruct.comp X.Modules` (defeq via the synonym's `inferInstanceAs` Category instance).
  -- Either makes every `РЅФ` one instance; then `simp only [tensorObj, Category.assoc,
  -- Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` cancels the ╬╝-pair and the residual is the counit coherence
  --   `(L'a РЌЂ L'╬и_{bc}) РЅФ (c_A РіЌ c_{bc}) РЅФ (A РЌЂ (╬╝_{bc}.inv РЅФ (c_B РіЌ c_C)))
  --      = (L'a РЌЂ ╬╝_{bc}.inv) РЅФ (c_A РіЌ (c_B РіЌ c_C))`
  -- (`╬╝_natural_right` + the sheafification unit/counit triangle `L'╬и РЅФ c = id`).
  -- Partial advance to the furthest CLEAN point (one boundary crossed, ╬╝ intact):
  simp only [tensorObj]
  erw [Category.assoc]
  -- Peel the common leading `╬╝_{A,BРіЌC}.inv` (mandatory shield; proof's own idiom at ~L1919).
  refine congrArg (fun t => _ РЅФ t) ?_
  -- Reassociate across the comp-instance boundary + cancel `╬╝.hom РЅФ ╬╝.inv` (analogist-validated).
  erw [Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
  -- Residual counit coherence.  The post-cancel goal is MIXED-instance Рђћ `РіЌРѓў` is the
  -- `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` tensorHom but the joining `РЅФ` is the (defeq) `X.Modules` comp, so
  -- `Category.assoc`/`tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`/`whisker_exchange` all refuse to fire (plain `rw`
  -- finds no pattern; bare `erw` resolves `C := X.Modules` which has no `MonoidalCategory`; pinned
  -- `erw` whnf-bombs the ╬╝).  Re-elaborate the goal in a UNIFORM all-localized form via `show`
  -- (defeq cross), after which every `РЅФ` is the localized comp and the clean interchange + the
  -- adjunction triangle `L'╬и РЅФ c_{(BРіЌC)^#} = ­ЮЪЎ` fire with plain `rw`.
  show (((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
            (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
            (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)) РЌЂ
        ((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
            (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
            (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))) РЅФ
      (MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (sheafificationCounitIso A).hom
          (sheafificationCounitIso (sheafification.obj
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))).hom) РЅФ
        MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) A
          ((Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
              (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).inv РЅФ
            (MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
              (sheafificationCounitIso B).hom (sheafificationCounitIso C).hom)) =
    (((Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X)
          (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)).obj ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)) РЌЂ
        (Localization.Monoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))
          (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).inv) РЅФ
      (MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
        (sheafificationCounitIso A).hom
        (MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (sheafificationCounitIso B).hom (sheafificationCounitIso C).hom))
  simp only [Рєљ MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom]
  -- Merge by interchange (`simp` discrimination-tree matching avoids the `rw` isDefEq blowup now
  -- that the comp instance is uniform); the identity legs clean up too.
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom, Category.id_comp, Category.comp_id]
  -- Split the merged `_ РіЌРѓў _`; first factor closes by `congr`'s rfl, second is the triangle.
  congr 1
  simp only [sheafificationCounitIso]
  erw [(PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
    (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).left_triangle_components_assoc]
  rfl

/-- **Bridge: the hand-built associator is the localized associator**
(`lem:tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`).  The hand-built associator `tensorObjAssoc A B C`
equals the localized associator `╬▒^loc_{A,B,C}` conjugated by the object identifications
`tensorObjLocalizedIso` on all four tensor slots.  Both halves meet at the common form `K`
(`assocCommonForm`): the localized side by `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs`, the
hand-built side by `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_rhs`. -/
lemma tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator (A B C : X.Modules) :
    (tensorObjLocalizedIso (tensorObj A B) C).hom РЅФ
        MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerRight (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (tensorObjLocalizedIso A B).hom (C : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) РЅФ
        (MonoidalCategoryStruct.associator (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (A : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) B C).hom
      = (tensorObjAssoc A B C).hom РЅФ
        (tensorObjLocalizedIso A (tensorObj B C)).hom РЅФ
        MonoidalCategoryStruct.whiskerLeft (C := modulesLocalizedMonoidal X)
          (A : modulesLocalizedMonoidal X) (tensorObjLocalizedIso B C).hom :=
  (tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs A B C).trans
    (tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_rhs A B C).symm

        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C) Рќи

        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)).hom =

        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app

  slice_rhs 2 4 => erw [hcol]
  -- Rewrite the two whiskered units as `╬╝`-conjugates (`sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu`

  rw [sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu']
  slice_rhs 2 2 => erw [sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu' ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B РіЌ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)]
  -- ADVANCE (iter-011): the canonical keystones (`_eq_mu'`) emit the trailing `╬╝` with object
  -- `(toPresheafOfModules X).obj (sheafification.obj (aРіЌb))`, and `simp only [tensorObj]` rewrites
  -- `tensorObjLocalizedIso`'s `╬╝` object `(toPresheafOfModules X).obj (A.tensorObj B)` to the SAME
  -- unfolded form Рђћ so both `╬╝` occurrences now print with *identical object arguments* on each
  -- side (verified via LSP `lean_goal`).  This clears iter-010's object-fold blocker: the residual
  -- `╬╝`-pair is `╬╝.hom РЅФ ╬╝.inv` (LHS, segment-1 keystone vs `tensorObjLocalizedIso`) and
  -- `╬╝.hom РЅФ ╬╝.inv` (RHS, left-keystone vs `tensorObjLocalizedIso`).
