  -- `╬╝_natural_left/right`, `associator_hom_app`, counit-triple identification) then proceeds on
  -- each isolated half.  Constructing the well-typed `K` (with the counit object-glue on all four
  -- tensor slots) is the gating sub-task for that split; see task_results.
-/

/-! ### Section components and index-equality transport
(`def:sectionsCast`, `lem:sectionsCast_refl`, `lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`,
`lem:sectionMul_coherent`)
-/

/- Planner strategy: these are the bottom bricks of the graded-ring assembly.  The prover
(mathlib-build mode) will prove them, THEN build `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` /
`sectionGradedModule_gmodule` instances on top Рђћ those instance defs are LEFT UNSCAFFOLDED here.

Pattern: field-for-field port of `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorPower.Basic`
  (GradedMonoid.GMonoid Рєњ DirectSum.GSemiring Рєњ DirectSum.GCommSemiring; separate DirectSum.Gmodule),
with `sectionsCast` in place of `TensorPower.cast` and `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` producing the
GMonoid sigma-Eq fields.  `gnpow` defaults: do NOT supply (TensorPower.Basic:192-197 omits them).

Crux inputs `tensorObjAssoc`, `tensorPowAdd` are DONE/leanok above in this file.

Implementation hints per `analogies/snap-gcomm.md`:
Рђб `sectionsCast L h` = the `╬Њ­Юњф`-linear equiv underlying
  `((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) h)).hom.val.app (op Ріц))`;
  refl case: `eqToIso_refl` gives `Iso.refl`, `map_id` collapses to `LinearEquiv.refl`.
Рђб `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`: substitute `j = i` via `h`, apply `sectionsCast_refl`; `simpa`.
Рђб Coherence proofs reduce to the presheaf level where eval at the top open is STRICT monoidal
  (naturality of the sheafification unit ╬и through `tensorObjAssoc`/`tensorObjUnitIso`/
  `tensorPowAdd`; ride ╬и through associator, unitors, braiding).
Рђб `GMul.mul a b` = `(tensorPowAdd L i j).hom.val.app (op Ріц)` Рѕў `sectionsMul (tensorPow L i)
  (tensorPow L j)` applied to `a РіЌРѓю b`.
Рђб `GOne.one` = image of `(1 : ╬Њ­Юњф)` under the canonical iso
  `╬Њ(X, ­Юњф_X) РЅЁ ╬Њ(X, unitModule X) = sectionDeg L 0`.
-/

/-- The carrier type of the section graded ring at degree `m`: the `╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)`-module of global
sections of the `m`-th tensor power of `L`.  Inherits `AddCommGroup` and `Module ╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)` from
the underlying `ModuleCat` object. -/
abbrev sectionDeg (L : X.Modules) (m : РёЋ) : Type u :=
  РєЦ((tensorPow L m).val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))

/-- Index-equality transport of section components: applying `╬Њ(X,-)` to the canonical isomorphism
`L^{РіЌi} РЅЁ L^{РіЌj}` induced by `h : i = j` under `tensorPow` (`def:sectionsCast`).
Section-level analogue of `TensorPower.cast` from `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorPower.Basic`. -/
noncomputable def sectionsCast (L : X.Modules) {i j : РёЋ} (h : i = j) :
    sectionDeg L i РЅЃРѓЌ[РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] sectionDeg L j :=
  match j, h with
  | _, rfl => LinearEquiv.refl _ _

/-- The transport along the reflexive equality `rfl : i = i` equals the identity automorphism
(`lem:sectionsCast_refl`).  Section-level analogue of `TensorPower.cast_refl`. -/
@[simp] lemma sectionsCast_refl (L : X.Modules) (i : РёЋ) :
    sectionsCast L (rfl : i = i) = LinearEquiv.refl _ (sectionDeg L i) :=
  rfl

/-- The section transport `sectionsCast L h` is `╬Њ(X,-)` (evaluation at the top open of the
underlying presheaf-of-modules morphism) applied to the canonical index isomorphism
`eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) h) : L^{РіЌi} РЅЁ L^{РіЌj}`.  This is the identification that lets the
coherence proofs (`sectionsMul_*`) cancel the `eqToIso` reindexing baked into `tensorPowAdd`
against the outer `sectionsCast`.  Proved by `subst`: at `rfl` both sides are the identity. -/
lemma sectionsCast_eq_eqToIso (L : X.Modules) {i j : РёЋ} (h : i = j) (x : sectionDeg L i) :
    sectionsCast L h x =
      ((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) h)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x := by
  subst h
  rfl

/-- Cancellation of the `tensorPowAdd`-style reindexing against the outer section transport: for
`h : j = i`, transporting along `h` undoes `╬Њ` of the index isomorphism induced by `h.symm`.  This
is the precise shape consumed by `sectionsMul_one_mul` / `sectionsMul_mul_one` (where `tensorPowAdd`
ends in `eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (┬и).symm)`). -/
lemma sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel (L : X.Modules) {i j : РёЋ} (h : j = i) (y : sectionDeg L i) :
    sectionsCast L h
        (((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) h.symm)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom y) = y := by
  subst h
  rfl

/-- Cast-mediated equality in the graded sigma type: if `a.fst = b.fst` and the section-component
transport maps `a.snd` to `b.snd`, then `a = b` as dependent pairs (`lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`).
Section-level analogue of `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` from `TensorPower.Basic` (line 123 there). -/
lemma gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast (L : X.Modules) {a b : GradedMonoid (sectionDeg L)}
    (h : a.1 = b.1) (h2 : sectionsCast L h a.2 = b.2) : a = b := by
  obtain РЪеi, xРЪЕ := a
  obtain РЪеj, yРЪЕ := b
  obtain rfl : i = j := h
  rw [sectionsCast_refl, LinearEquiv.refl_apply] at h2
  subst h2
  rfl

/-- Degreewise graded multiplication on section components:
`sectionDeg L i ├Ќ sectionDeg L j Рєњ sectionDeg L (i+j)`, defined as the composition
`╬Њ(╬╝_{i,j}) Рѕў sectionsMul` applied to `a РіЌРѓю b`.  Required for the coherence lemma signatures. -/
noncomputable instance (L : X.Modules) : GradedMonoid.GMul (sectionDeg L) where
  mul {i j} (a : sectionDeg L i) (b : sectionDeg L j) :=
    ((tensorPowAdd L i j).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
      ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)).hom
        (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b))

/-- Graded unit in degree 0: the image of `1 Рѕѕ ╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)` in `sectionDeg L 0 = ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌ0})`
via the canonical `╬Њ­Юњф`-module isomorphism.  Required for the coherence lemma signatures. -/
noncomputable instance (L : X.Modules) : GradedMonoid.GOne (sectionDeg L) where
  one := (1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))

/-- Definitional unfolding of the graded multiplication: `a * b` is the section
multiplication of the components followed by `╬Њ` of the tensor-power comparison
`╬╝_{i,j}`.  Holds by `rfl` and is the reuse handle for the bilinearity (`GSemiring`)
fields below. -/
lemma gMul_def (L : X.Modules) {i j : РёЋ} (a : sectionDeg L i) (b : sectionDeg L j) :
    GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a b
      = ((tensorPowAdd L i j).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)).hom
            (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)) :=
  rfl

/-! ### Helpers for the coherence proofs

The coherences (`sectionsMul_*`) all reduce, after cancelling the `tensorPowAdd`
reindexing against the outer `sectionsCast`, to an identity of the shape
`╬Њ(structural-iso)(╬и(elementary tensor)) = Рђд`, which is proved by `╬и`-naturality
against the corresponding presheaf-level structural isomorphism plus a
triangle/unitor identity.  These helpers package the recurring carrier bookkeeping
(`SheafOfModules.comp_val` + `PresheafOfModules.comp_app` + the value-`ModuleCat`
diamond, handled in term mode) so the mathematical content stays visible. -/

/-- Application of a composite sheaf-of-modules morphism at the top open splits as the
composition of the applications: `╬Њ(f РЅФ g)(x) = ╬Њ(g)(╬Њ(f)(x))`.  This is the non-`rfl`
split needed because the positional `comp_apply`/`hom_comp` rewrites hit the value-`ModuleCat`
diamond; the final `rfl` is the term-mode reduction. -/
lemma val_app_top_comp {A B C : X.Modules} (f : A РЪХ B) (g : B РЪХ C)
    (x : РєЦ(A.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((f РЅФ g).val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x
      = (g.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom ((f.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x) :=
  rfl

/-- The `m = 0` branch of `tensorPowAdd`: `╬╝_{0,n}` is the left unitor reindexed along
`0 + n = n`.  Holds by `rfl` (iota on the literal `0`), so it never forces the
whnf-timeout-prone unfolding of the recursive branch. -/
lemma tensorPowAdd_zero (L : X.Modules) (n : РёЋ) :
    tensorPowAdd L 0 n =
      tensorObjUnitIso (tensorPow L n) РЅфРЅФ
        eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (Nat.zero_add n).symm) :=
  rfl

/-- The hom of the left-unitor iso splits as the sheafified presheaf left unitor followed by
the sheafification counit. -/
lemma tensorObjUnitIso_hom (G : X.Modules) :
    (tensorObjUnitIso G).hom
      = sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom РЅФ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom :=
  rfl

/-- **Unitor-╬и core** of left unitality.  Applying `╬Њ` of the left-unitor iso
`tensorObjUnitIso G` to the section multiplication `╬и(1 РіЌ a)` returns `a`.

Mathematically: split `(tensorObjUnitIso G).hom = ╬Њ(╬╗_p)^# РЅФ ╬х_G` (sheafified presheaf
left unitor, then the sheafification counit).  Unit-naturality of `╬и` against the
presheaf left unitor `╬╗_p` (whose value at `Ріц` sends `1 РіЌ a Рєд 1 Рђб a = a`) rewrites
`╬Њ(╬╗_p)^#(╬и(1РіЌa)) = ╬и_G(a)`; the right-triangle identity of the sheafification
adjunction then gives `╬х_G(╬и_G(a)) = a`. -/
lemma unitor_sectionsMul (G : X.Modules) (a : РєЦ(G.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((tensorObjUnitIso G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (unitModule X) G).hom
          ((1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
            РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] a)) = a := by
  -- Split the unitor into the sheafified presheaf left unitor and the counit, then peel the
  -- composite application via `val_app_top_comp` (handles the value-`ModuleCat` diamond in
  -- term mode).
  rw [tensorObjUnitIso_hom]
  -- Split the composite application `╬Њ(f РЅФ g)(x) = ╬Њ(g)(╬Њ(f)(x))` in term mode (`show` reduces
  -- at default transparency, bridging the `tensorObj`/`sheafification.obj` def and the value-
  -- `ModuleCat` diamond that block positional `rw`).
  show ((sheafificationCounitIso G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        (((sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom).val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (unitModule X) G).hom
            ((1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
              РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] a))) = a
  -- Transpose identity: the composite `╬╗_p^# РЅФ ╬х_G` is the adjunct of the presheaf left unitor
  -- `╬╗_p`.  In the adjunction `sheafification РіБ forget`, `homEquiv (╬╗_p^# РЅФ ╬х_G) = ╬╗_p`: indeed
  -- `homEquiv.symm ╬╗_p = (╬╗_p)^# РЅФ ╬х_G` (`homEquiv_counit`), which is exactly the composite (the
  -- counit iso is the counit), so applying `homEquiv` to both sides gives the claim.
  have H : (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).homEquiv
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) G
        (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom РЅФ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom)
      = (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom := by
    have hsymm : sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom РЅФ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom
        = ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).homEquiv
            (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) G).symm
            (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom :=
      (Adjunction.homEquiv_counit (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) _ _ _).symm
    exact ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).homEquiv
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X))
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) G).apply_eq_iff_eq_symm_apply.mpr hsymm
  -- Unfold `homEquiv` to the unit form, evaluate at the top open on `1 РіЌ a`.
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit] at H
  have Hel := congrArg
      (fun m : (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) РЪХ
            (toPresheafOfModules X).obj G =>
        (m.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
            РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] a)) H
  -- The presheaf left unitor sends `1 РіЌ a Рєд 1 Рђб a = a`.
  have Hunit :
      ((MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
          РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] a) = a := by
    -- The presheaf left unitor at `Ріц` is, by construction, the value-`ModuleCat` left unitor.
    have happ : (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom.app (Opposite.op Ріц)
          = (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := ModuleCat (X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
              (((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G).obj (Opposite.op Ріц))).hom := rfl
    rw [happ]
    -- `erw` bridges the `CommRingCat`/`RingCat` tmul-key diamond; the unitor sends `1 РіЌ a Рєд 1 Рђб a`.
    erw [ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_hom_apply, one_smul]
  exact Hel.trans Hunit

/-- **Braiding-╬и core** of commutativity (`lem:sectionMul_braiding_core`).  Applying `╬Њ` of the
braiding iso `tensorBraiding F G` to the section multiplication `╬и(¤Ѓ РіЌ ¤ё)` swaps the factors:
it equals the section multiplication `╬и(¤ё РіЌ ¤Ѓ)` of the swapped pair.

Mathematically this is pure unit-naturality of `╬и` against the presheaf braiding `╬▓_p`: the
naturality square `╬▓_p РЅФ ╬и_{GРіЌ_pF} = ╬и_{FРіЌ_pG} РЅФ (╬▓_p)^#` evaluated at the top open on
`¤Ѓ РіЌ ¤ё`, using that `╬▓_p` at `Ріц` sends `¤Ѓ РіЌ ¤ё Рєд ¤ё РіЌ ¤Ѓ`.  No counit/triangle input is needed. -/
lemma sectionMul_braiding_core (F G : X.Modules)
    (¤Ѓ : РєЦ(F.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) (¤ё : РєЦ(G.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((tensorBraiding F G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul F G).hom
          (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё))
      = (sectionsMul G F).hom
          (¤ё РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ѓ) := by
  -- Unit naturality of `╬и` against the presheaf braiding `╬▓_p : FРіЌ_pG РЪХ GРіЌ_pF`.
  have H := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.naturality
    (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom
  -- Evaluate the presheaf-morphism equality at the top open on `¤Ѓ РіЌ ¤ё`.
  have Hel := congrArg
      (fun m : (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) РЪХ
            (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj) РІЎ
              (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).comp
                (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj))).obj
              (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
                ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F)) =>
        (m.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё)) H
  -- The presheaf braiding at `Ріц` sends `¤Ѓ РіЌ ¤ё Рєд ¤ё РіЌ ¤Ѓ`.
  have Hbraid :
      ((BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom.app
            (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё)
        = ¤ё РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ѓ := by
    have happ : (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom.app
              (Opposite.op Ріц)
          = (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := ModuleCat (X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
              (((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F).obj (Opposite.op Ріц))
              (((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G).obj (Opposite.op Ріц))).hom := rfl
    rw [happ]
    rfl
  -- `Hel.symm` is, after the defeq comp-app split + the `forget/restrictScalars` identity of the
  -- right adjoint, exactly `╬Њ(╬▓)(sectionsMul F G (¤ЃРіЌ¤ё)) = sectionsMul G F (╬▓_p(¤ЃРіЌ¤ё))`; rewriting
  -- the braiding image `╬▓_p(¤ЃРіЌ¤ё) = ¤ёРіЌ¤Ѓ` inside `sectionsMul G F` (`Hbraid`) closes the goal.
  exact Hel.symm.trans (congrArg (fun w => (sectionsMul G F).hom w) Hbraid)

/-- **Right-unitor-╬и core** of right unitality (`lem:sectionMul_rightUnitor_core`).  Applying `╬Њ`
of the right unitor `tensorObjRightUnitor G` to the section multiplication `╬и(a РіЌ 1)` returns `a`.

Reduction (blueprint): `¤Ђ_G = ╬╗_G Рѕў ╬▓_{G,­ЮЪЎ}`; split the application via `val_app_top_comp`, send
`╬и(a РіЌ 1)` across the braiding to `╬и(1 РіЌ a)` by `sectionMul_braiding_core`, then apply the
left-unitor core `unitor_sectionsMul`. -/
lemma sectionMul_rightUnitor_core (G : X.Modules) (a : РєЦ(G.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((tensorObjRightUnitor G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul G (unitModule X)).hom
          (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))]
            (1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))))) = a := by
  rw [tensorObjRightUnitor_hom]
  rw [show ((tensorBraiding G (unitModule X)).hom РЅФ (tensorObjUnitIso G).hom).val.app
        (Opposite.op Ріц)
      = ((tensorBraiding G (unitModule X)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)) РЅФ
          ((tensorObjUnitIso G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)) from rfl]
  show ((tensorObjUnitIso G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
      (((tensorBraiding G (unitModule X)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul G (unitModule X)).hom
          (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))]
            (1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))))) = a
  rw [sectionMul_braiding_core G (unitModule X) a (1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))]
  exact unitor_sectionsMul G a

/-- **Unit-naturality at the top open** (project-local helper).  Applying `╬Њ` (the top-open value)
of the sheafification `sheafification.map f` of a presheaf-of-modules morphism `f : P РЪХ Q` to the
sheafification-unit image `╬и_P(x)` returns the unit image `╬и_Q(f(x))` of the transported element.
This is the single naturality square of the sheafification unit `╬и`, evaluated at `Ріц`; it is the
common engine of the section-╬и cores and is applied once per segment in `sectionMul_assoc_core`. -/
private lemma sheafification_map_unit_top {P Q : X.PresheafOfModules} (f : P РЪХ Q)
    (x : РєЦ(P.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((sheafification.map f).val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P).app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x)
      = ((((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q).app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom ((f.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x)) := by
  have H := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.naturality f
  exact (congrArg (fun m => (m.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x) H).symm

/-- Inverse companion of `sheafification_map_unit_top`: when `sheafification.map f` is an
isomorphism, `╬Њ(inv (sheafification.map f))` sends the unit image `╬и_Q(f x)` back to the unit image
`╬и_P(x)`.  Used for the inverse whiskered-unit segment (segment 1) of `tensorObjAssoc`. -/
private lemma sheafification_map_unit_top_inv {P Q : X.PresheafOfModules} (f : P РЪХ Q)
    [IsIso (sheafification.map f)] (x : РєЦ(P.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((inv (sheafification.map f)).val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app Q).app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom ((f.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x))
      = ((((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app P).app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom x) := by
  rw [Рєљ sheafification_map_unit_top f x, Рєљ val_app_top_comp, IsIso.hom_inv_id]
  rfl

/-- **Right-whisker naturality of the section multiplication** (`sectionsMul`-whiskering brick).
For `f : A РЪХ A'` in `X.Modules`, the section multiplication of `╬Њ(f)(a)` and `b` equals `╬Њ` of the
sheafified right-whiskering `(fРЎГ Рќи BРЎГ)^#` applied to the section multiplication of `a` and `b`.
Pure unit-naturality of `╬и` against the presheaf right-whiskering `fРЎГ Рќи BРЎГ` (the single naturality
square `sheafification_map_unit_top`). -/
lemma sectionsMul_whiskerRight {A A' : X.Modules} (f : A РЪХ A') (B : X.Modules)
    (a : РєЦ(A.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) (b : РєЦ(B.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    (sectionsMul A' B).hom
        ((f.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom a
          РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)
      = ((sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).map f) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))).val.app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul A B).hom (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)) :=
  (sheafification_map_unit_top
    (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).map f) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))
    (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)).symm

/-- **Left-whisker naturality of the section multiplication** (`sectionsMul`-whiskering brick).
For `g : B РЪХ B'` in `X.Modules`, the section multiplication of `a` and `╬Њ(g)(b)` equals `╬Њ` of the
sheafified left-whiskering `(AРЎГ РЌЂ gРЎГ)^#` applied to the section multiplication of `a` and `b`.
Pure unit-naturality of `╬и` against the presheaf left-whiskering `AРЎГ РЌЂ gРЎГ`. -/
lemma sectionsMul_whiskerLeft (A : X.Modules) {B B' : X.Modules} (g : B РЪХ B')
    (a : РєЦ(A.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) (b : РєЦ(B.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    (sectionsMul A B').hom
        (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))]
          (g.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom b)
      = ((sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map g))).val.app
          (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul A B).hom (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)) :=
  (sheafification_map_unit_top
    (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map g))
    (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)).symm

/-- **Associativity-╬и core** of associativity (`lem:sectionMul_assoc_core`).  Applying `╬Њ` of the
sheaf associator `tensorObjAssoc A B C` to the left-bracketed iterated section multiplication
`╬и((¤Ѓ┬и¤ё) РіЌ ¤Ё)` yields the right-bracketed one `╬и(¤Ѓ РіЌ (¤ё┬и¤Ё))`.

Mathematically (blueprint): both sides are iterated `╬и`-images of elementary tensors; the sheaf
associator is the presheaf associator `╬▒_p` sheafified and conjugated by the whiskered-unit
comparison isos (`tensorObjAssoc`, `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`).  On an `╬и`-image
those comparison isos act as the identity reparametrisation, so only `(╬▒_p)^#` contributes, and
`╬и`-naturality against `╬▒_p` (which reassociates `(¤ЃРіЌ¤ё)РіЌ¤Ё Рєд ¤ЃРіЌ(¤ёРіЌ¤Ё)` at the top open) closes it.

The reparametrisation-by-comparison-iso step (the conjugation in `tensorObjAssoc` segments 1/3
acting trivially on a unit image) is the remaining obstacle; it is the sheaf-level shadow of the
Mac Lane coherence transfer also needed by `tensorPowAdd_assoc`. -/
lemma sectionMul_assoc_core (A B C : X.Modules)
    (¤Ѓ : РєЦ(A.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) (¤ё : РєЦ(B.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
    (¤Ё : РєЦ(C.val.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) :
    ((tensorObjAssoc A B C).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (tensorObj A B) C).hom
          (((sectionsMul A B).hom (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё))
            РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ё))
      = (sectionsMul A (tensorObj B C)).hom
          (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))]
            ((sectionsMul B C).hom (¤ё РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ё))) := by
  -- The whiskered-unit segments (1 and 4) are isos by the strong-monoidality comparison.
  haveI i1 := isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
    (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)
  haveI i2 := isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit
    (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))
    ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
  -- Expand `tensorObjAssoc` into its five segments and peel the top-open application of the
  -- composite into the five nested `╬Њ(sheafification.map _)` (segment 1 inverted).
  simp only [tensorObjAssoc, Iso.trans_hom, val_app_top_comp, Iso.symm_hom, asIso_hom, asIso_inv,
    Functor.mapIso_hom]
  -- Segment 1 (inverse whiskered unit): sends the `sectionsMul` nest back to the triple-presheaf
  -- unit image `╬и_{(aРіЌРѓџb)РіЌРѓџc}((¤ЃРіЌ¤ё)РіЌ¤Ё)`.
  have h1 : ((inv (sheafification.map (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
            (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)))
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))).val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorObj A B) C).hom
            (((sectionsMul A B).hom (¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё))
              РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ё))
        = (((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
            (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
                ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B))
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))).app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
            ((¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё)
              РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ё) :=
    sheafification_map_unit_top_inv (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))
      ((¤Ѓ РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤ё)
        РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] ¤Ё)
  erw [h1]
  -- Segments 2РђЊ5: unit naturality (associator, braiding, whiskered unit, braiding).
  erw [sheafification_map_unit_top (MonoidalCategory.associator (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)).hom,
    sheafification_map_unit_top (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C))).hom,
    sheafification_map_unit_top (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj C)))
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)),
    sheafification_map_unit_top (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorObj B C)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)).hom]
  -- The remaining presheaf-level structural maps (associator, braiding, whiskered unit, braiding)
  -- evaluated at the top open compute definitionally on the elementary tensor `(¤ЃРіЌ¤ё)РіЌ¤Ё`, sending it
  -- to `¤Ѓ РіЌ ╬и(¤ёРіЌ¤Ё)`, which is the right-bracketed section multiplication.
  rfl

/-! ### Flattened presheaf tensor power and the per-degree collapse (`lem:muGamma_collapse`)

The blueprint's section-level associativity route flattens each degreewise product to a single
`╬Њ(╬и)`-image of a *presheaf* tensor power (no inner sheafification), where bracketing-independence
is the concrete `TensorProduct.assoc`.  `tensorPowPsh L k` is that flattened presheaf `k`-fold
tensor power, and `tensorPowComparison L k : tensorPowPsh L k РЪХ (tensorPow L k)РЎГ` (`╬и_k`) is the
comparison to the underlying presheaf of the sheaf tensor power.  These are the carriers of
`muGamma_collapse`; the whiskering bricks `sectionsMul_whiskerRight/Left` are its naturality
engine. -/

/-- The flattened presheaf `k`-fold tensor power `P^{(k)}` of `L` (no inner sheafification):
`P^{(0)} = (unitModule X)РЎГ` and `P^{(k+1)} = P^{(k)} РіЌ_p LРЎГ`, in the presheaf monoidal structure
`PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory`.  Carrier of `lem:muGamma_collapse`. -/
noncomputable def tensorPowPsh (L : X.Modules) : РёЋ Рєњ X.PresheafOfModules
  | 0 => (toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X)
  | (k + 1) => MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      (tensorPowPsh L k) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)

/-- The comparison `╬и_k : P^{(k)} РЪХ (L^{РіЌk})РЎГ` from the flattened presheaf `k`-fold tensor power
to the underlying presheaf of the sheaf tensor power: `╬и_0 = ­ЮЪЎ` and
`╬и_{k+1} = (╬и_k Рќи LРЎГ) РЅФ ╬и^{shf}`, where `╬и^{shf}` is the sheafification unit at
`(L^{РіЌk})РЎГ РіЌ_p LРЎГ` (whose top-open value is `sectionsMul (L^{РіЌk}) L`).  Carrier of
`lem:muGamma_collapse`. -/
noncomputable def tensorPowComparison (L : X.Modules) :
    (k : РёЋ) Рєњ (tensorPowPsh L k РЪХ (toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorPow L k))
  | 0 => ­ЮЪЎ _
  | (k + 1) =>
      MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) (tensorPowComparison L k)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (tensorPow L k)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L))

/-! ### Tensor-power comparison coherences (`lem:tensorPowAdd_{rightUnit,braiding,assoc}`)

These factor the comparison `╬╝_{m,m'}` (`tensorPowAdd`) along the unit/braiding/associator
branches, transferring the symmetric-monoidal Mac Lane coherences of the presheaf monoidal
structure through the `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` comparison isos.  They are the
structural half of `lem:sectionMul_coherent`; the section-level cores above discharge the
sheafification-unit bookkeeping. -/

/-- In any braided monoidal category the braiding of the unit object with itself is the identity,
`╬▓_{­ЮЪЎ,­ЮЪЎ} = ­ЮЪЎ`.  (`braiding_tensorUnit_left` at `­ЮЪЎ` plus `unitors_equal`.)  Project-local helper for
the base cases of the tensor-power comparison coherences. -/
private lemma braiding_unit_unit {C : Type*} [Category C] [MonoidalCategory C] [BraidedCategory C] :
    ╬▓_ (­ЮЪЎ_ C) (­ЮЪЎ_ C) = Iso.refl _ := by
  apply Iso.ext
  rw [Iso.refl_hom, braiding_tensorUnit_left, MonoidalCategory.unitors_equal, Iso.hom_inv_id]

/-- The hand-built sheaf braiding of the unit module with itself is the identity.  Pure
sheafification-functoriality of the presheaf-level fact `braiding_unit_unit` (no monoidal structure
on `X.Modules` needed): the underlying presheaf of `unitModule X` is the presheaf monoidal unit. -/
private lemma tensorBraiding_unitModule (X : Scheme.{u}) :
    tensorBraiding (unitModule X) (unitModule X) = Iso.refl _ := by
  have hb : BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X)) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X))
      = Iso.refl _ := braiding_unit_unit
  show sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X))
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X))) = Iso.refl _
  rw [hb]
  exact Functor.mapIso_refl _ _

/-- The hand-built sheaf braiding is involutive: `╬▓_{F,G} РЅФ ╬▓_{G,F} = ­ЮЪЎ`.  Pure
sheafification-functoriality of the presheaf symmetry `SymmetricCategory.symmetry` (no monoidal
structure on `X.Modules` needed).  Used in the base case of `tensorPowAdd_braiding`. -/
private lemma tensorBraiding_symm (F G : X.Modules) :
    tensorBraiding F G РЅфРЅФ tensorBraiding G F = Iso.refl _ := by
  have hs : (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) РЅфРЅФ
      (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F)) = Iso.refl _ := by
    apply Iso.ext; simp [SymmetricCategory.symmetry]
  show sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) РЅфРЅФ
      sheafification.mapIso (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F)) = Iso.refl _
  rw [Рєљ Functor.mapIso_trans]
  exact (congrArg sheafification.mapIso hs).trans (Functor.mapIso_refl _ _)

/-- **Right-unit branch** of the tensor-power comparison (`lem:tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`): `╬╝_{n,0}`
factors as the right unitor `¤Ђ_{L^{РіЌn}}` (`tensorObjRightUnitor`) followed by the index-equality
isomorphism `n = n + 0`.  Proved by induction on `n`; the successor step is the symmetric-monoidal
identity `¤Ђ_{AРіЌL} = (¤Ђ_A Рќи L) Рѕў ╬▒РЂ╗┬╣ Рѕў (A РЌЂ ╬▓) Рѕў ╬▒` transferred from the presheaf level. -/
lemma tensorPowAdd_rightUnit (L : X.Modules) (n : РёЋ) :
    tensorPowAdd L n 0 = tensorObjRightUnitor (tensorPow L n) РЅфРЅФ
      eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_zero n).symm) := by
  induction n with
  | zero =>
    -- Base: `╬╝_{0,0}` is `╬╗_­ЮЪЎ` (by `tensorPowAdd_zero`) and `¤Ђ_­ЮЪЎ = ╬╗_­ЮЪЎ Рѕў ╬▓_{­ЮЪЎ,­ЮЪЎ}`.  After
    -- unfolding both unitors and matching the index isos, `congr 1` reduces the base case to the
    -- single residual `╬╗_­ЮЪЎ = ╬▓_{­ЮЪЎ,­ЮЪЎ} РЅФ ╬╗_­ЮЪЎ`, i.e. `tensorBraiding ­ЮЪЎ ­ЮЪЎ = ­ЮЪЎ` (the symmetry on the
    -- unit object), the one remaining presheaf-level coherence fact for the base.
    rw [tensorPowAdd_zero, tensorObjRightUnitor]
    congr 1
    show tensorObjUnitIso (unitModule X)
        = tensorBraiding (unitModule X) (unitModule X) РЅфРЅФ tensorObjUnitIso (unitModule X)
    rw [tensorBraiding_unitModule, Iso.refl_trans]
  | succ k _ih =>
    -- Successor: expand `╬╝_{k+1,0}` by the `tensorPowAdd` successor branch and use the IH; the
    -- residual is the Mac Lane right-unit coherence transferred through `tensorObjAssoc`.
    sorry

/-- **Commutativity branch** of the tensor-power comparison (`lem:tensorPowAdd_braiding`):
`╬╝_{na,nb}` agrees with `╬╝_{nb,na}` after braiding `╬▓_{L^{РіЌna},L^{РіЌnb}}` and the index-equality
isomorphism `nb + na = na + nb`.  Proved by induction on `na`; transfers the hexagon coherence of
the presheaf symmetric monoidal structure. -/
lemma tensorPowAdd_braiding (L : X.Modules) (na nb : РёЋ) :
    tensorPowAdd L na nb = tensorBraiding (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) РЅфРЅФ
      tensorPowAdd L nb na РЅфРЅФ eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_comm nb na)) := by
  induction na with
  | zero =>
    -- Base: `╬╝_{0,nb} = ╬╗`, and `╬╝_{nb,0} = ¤Ђ = ╬╗ Рѕў ╬▓` (`tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`); the two
    -- braidings `╬▓_{­ЮЪЎ,L^{РіЌnb}}` / `╬▓_{L^{РіЌnb},­ЮЪЎ}` cancel by `tensorBraiding_symm`, leaving the
    -- left unitor with matching `eqToIso` reindexers (proof-irrelevant Nat equalities).
    show tensorPowAdd L 0 nb = tensorBraiding (unitModule X) (tensorPow L nb) РЅфРЅФ
      tensorPowAdd L nb 0 РЅфРЅФ eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_comm nb 0))
    rw [tensorPowAdd_zero, tensorPowAdd_rightUnit]
    simp only [tensorObjRightUnitor, Iso.trans_assoc]
    rw [Рєљ Iso.trans_assoc, tensorBraiding_symm (unitModule X) (tensorPow L nb), Iso.refl_trans]
    congr 1
  | succ k _ih =>
    -- Successor: hexagon coherence transferred through `tensorObjAssoc` + IH at index `k`.
    sorry

/-- **Associativity branch** of the tensor-power comparison (`lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc`): the two
bracketings of `L^{РіЌna} РіЌ L^{РіЌnb} РіЌ L^{РіЌnc}` agree after the index-equality isomorphism
`(na+nb)+nc = na+(nb+nc)`.  Proved by induction on `na`; transfers the pentagon coherence. -/
lemma tensorPowAdd_assoc (L : X.Modules) (na nb nc : РёЋ) :
    (tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L na nb) (tensorPow L nc)).symm РЅфРЅФ
        tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc) РЅфРЅФ
        tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L na) (tensorPowAdd L nb nc) РЅфРЅФ
        tensorPowAdd L na (nb + nc) =
      tensorPowAdd L (na + nb) nc РЅфРЅФ
        eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_assoc na nb nc)) := by
  induction na with
  | zero =>
    -- Base: reduces to the triangle identity relating left unitor and associator.
    sorry
  | succ k _ih =>
    -- Successor: pentagon coherence transferred through `tensorObjAssoc` + IH at index `k`.
    sorry

/-- Left unitality of the graded section multiplication (`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, left-unit case):
for `a Рѕѕ ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌn})`, transporting `1 ┬и a` along `0 + n = n` gives `a`.
Mirrors `TensorPower.one_mul`.

Reduction: `╬╝_{0,n}` is (by the `m = 0` branch of `tensorPowAdd`, `tensorPowAdd_zero`) the left
unitor `tensorObjUnitIso (L^{РіЌn})` post-composed with the index reindex
`eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (Nat.zero_add n).symm)`.  Splitting `╬Њ(╬╝_{0,n})` along this
composite (`Iso.trans_hom` + `val_app_top_comp`) and cancelling the reindex against the outer
`sectionsCast` (`sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel`) reduces the goal to the unitor-╬и core
`unitor_sectionsMul`. -/
theorem sectionsMul_one_mul (L : X.Modules) {n : РёЋ} (a : sectionDeg L n) :
    sectionsCast L (zero_add n) (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul GradedMonoid.GOne.one a) = a := by
  rw [gMul_def, tensorPowAdd_zero, Iso.trans_hom]
  -- Split off the index reindex `eqToIso` and align the element to the unit form, all by defeq
  -- (`show`, default transparency): `╬Њ(unitor РЅФ eqToIso)(╬и(1┬иa)) = ╬Њ(eqToIso)(╬Њ(unitor)(╬и(1┬иa)))`.
  show sectionsCast L (zero_add n)
      (((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (zero_add n).symm)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        (((tensorObjUnitIso (tensorPow L n)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (unitModule X) (tensorPow L n)).hom
            ((1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц)))
              РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] a)))) = a
  rw [sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel]
  exact unitor_sectionsMul (tensorPow L n) a

/-- Right unitality of the graded section multiplication
(`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, right-unit case):
for `a Рѕѕ ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌn})`, transporting `a ┬и 1` along `n + 0 = n` gives `a`.
Mirrors `TensorPower.mul_one`. -/
theorem sectionsMul_mul_one (L : X.Modules) {n : РёЋ} (a : sectionDeg L n) :
    sectionsCast L (add_zero n) (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a GradedMonoid.GOne.one) = a := by
  rw [gMul_def, tensorPowAdd_rightUnit, Iso.trans_hom]
  -- Split off the index reindex `eqToIso` and align the element to the right-unit form (defeq).
  show sectionsCast L (add_zero n)
      (((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_zero n).symm)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        (((tensorObjRightUnitor (tensorPow L n)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L n) (unitModule X)).hom
            (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))]
              (1 : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))))))) = a
  rw [sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel]
  exact sectionMul_rightUnitor_core (tensorPow L n) a

/-- Associativity of the graded section multiplication (`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, associativity):
transporting `(a ┬и b) ┬и c` along `(na + nb) + nc = na + (nb + nc)` gives `a ┬и (b ┬и c)`.
Mirrors `TensorPower.mul_assoc`. -/
theorem sectionsMul_mul_assoc (L : X.Modules) {na nb nc : РёЋ}
    (a : sectionDeg L na) (b : sectionDeg L nb) (c : sectionDeg L nc) :
    sectionsCast L (add_assoc na nb nc)
      (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a b) c) =
      GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul b c) := by
  -- Unfold the degreewise multiplication on both bracketings into `╬Њ(╬╝) Рѕў sectionsMul` nests.
  simp only [gMul_def]
  -- Section-level bookkeeping (all verified): commute the inner comparison maps `╬╝` out of the
  -- two `sectionsMul`s by the whiskering naturality bricks, intertwine the two iterated
  -- multiplications through the sheaf associator by `sectionMul_assoc_core`, and turn the outer
  -- `sectionsCast` into `╬Њ(eqToIso)`.  This discharges all the `╬и`-naturality, leaving a single
  -- iso-level (morphism) identity `M_L = M_R`.
  rw [sectionsMul_whiskerRight (tensorPowAdd L na nb).hom (tensorPow L nc)
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom
          (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)) c,
      sectionsMul_whiskerLeft (tensorPow L na) (tensorPowAdd L nb nc).hom a
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc)).hom
          (b РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] c)),
      Рєљ sectionMul_assoc_core (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc) a b c,
      sectionsCast_eq_eqToIso]
  -- Remaining: `╬Њ(eqToIso)(╬Њ(╬╝_{na+nb,nc})(╬Њ(WR)(W))) = ╬Њ(╬╝_{na,nb+nc})(╬Њ(WL)(╬Њ(╬▒)(W)))`,
  -- where `W = sectionsMul(L^na РіЌ L^nb, L^nc)(sectionsMul(L^na,L^nb)(aРіЌb) РіЌ c)`,
  -- `WR = tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (╬╝_{na,nb}) (L^nc)`, `WL = tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (L^na)
  -- (╬╝_{nb,nc})`, `╬▒ = tensorObjAssoc`.  Collapsing the nested `╬Њ`s into a single one
  -- (`val_app_top_comp`) reduces this to the morphism identity
  --   `WR.hom РЅФ ╬╝_{na+nb,nc} РЅФ eqToIso = ╬▒.hom РЅФ WL.hom РЅФ ╬╝_{na,nb+nc}`,
  -- i.e. the iso-level `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (pentagon).  On the live section route this identity
  -- is NOT proven directly (the conjugated sheaf associator has no Mathlib pentagon); instead the
  -- nested `╬Њ(╬и)`-image `W` is to be flattened by `muGamma_collapse` so the obstruction becomes the
  -- concrete presheaf `TensorProduct.assoc`.  The section-level reduction above is the verified
  -- scaffolding; the residual `hM` is the single remaining gap.
  have hM :
      (tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L na nb) (tensorPow L nc)).hom РЅФ
          (tensorPowAdd L (na + nb) nc).hom РЅФ
          (eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_assoc na nb nc))).hom
        = (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc)).hom РЅФ
            (tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L na) (tensorPowAdd L nb nc)).hom РЅФ
            (tensorPowAdd L na (nb + nc)).hom := by
    sorry
  exact congrArg (fun ¤є : tensorObj (tensorObj (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)) (tensorPow L nc) РЪХ
        tensorPow L (na + (nb + nc)) => (¤є.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (tensorObj (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)) (tensorPow L nc)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom
              (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b)
            РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] c))) hM

/-- Commutativity of the graded section multiplication (`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, commutativity):
transporting `a ┬и b` along `na + nb = nb + na` gives `b ┬и a`.
Section-level analogue of the `mul_comm` in `TensorPower.Basic`. -/
theorem sectionsMul_mul_comm (L : X.Modules) {na nb : РёЋ}
    (a : sectionDeg L na) (b : sectionDeg L nb) :
    sectionsCast L (add_comm na nb) (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a b) =
    GradedMonoid.GMul.mul b a := by
  rw [gMul_def, tensorPowAdd_braiding, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.trans_hom]
  -- Split `╬Њ(╬▓ РЅФ ╬╝_{nb,na} РЅФ eqToIso)(╬и(aРіЌb))` into the three applications (defeq).
  show sectionsCast L (add_comm na nb)
      (((eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_comm nb na))).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
        (((tensorPowAdd L nb na).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
          (((tensorBraiding (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom
            ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom
              (a РіЌРѓю[РєЦ(X.sheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))] b))))) = GradedMonoid.GMul.mul b a
  -- Send `╬Њ(╬▓)(╬и(aРіЌb))` to `╬и(bРіЌa)` (braiding core), cancel the reindex, recognise `b ┬и a`.
  rw [sectionMul_braiding_core (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) a b,
    sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel]
  rfl

/-! ### Graded-ring assembly (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`)

The section components `m Рєд ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌm})` carry a `DirectSum.GCommSemiring`, assembled
field-for-field as `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorPower.Basic` builds its graded semiring:
the graded-monoid layer from the four cast-mediated coherences via `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`,
and the bilinearity (`GSemiring`) fields for free from the `╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)`-linearity of the
degreewise multiplication `╬Њ(╬╝) Рѕў sectionsMul` (recorded by `gMul_def`). -/

/-- Graded-monoid structure on the section components: the unit and associativity coherences
are the cast-mediated identities `sectionsMul_{one_mul,mul_one,mul_assoc}` repackaged as
dependent-pair equalities by `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`.  `gnpow` is defaulted (as in
`TensorPower.Basic`). -/
noncomputable instance instGMonoid (L : X.Modules) : GradedMonoid.GMonoid (sectionDeg L) :=
  { (inferInstance : GradedMonoid.GMul (sectionDeg L)),
    (inferInstance : GradedMonoid.GOne (sectionDeg L)) with
    one_mul := fun _ => gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (zero_add _) (sectionsMul_one_mul L _)
    mul_one := fun _ => gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_zero _) (sectionsMul_mul_one L _)
    mul_assoc := fun _ _ _ =>
      gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_assoc _ _ _) (sectionsMul_mul_assoc L _ _ _) }

/-- Graded-semiring structure on the section components.  The bilinearity fields are free:
the degreewise multiplication `╬Њ(╬╝) Рѕў sectionsMul` is `╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)`-linear (it is a composite of
the bilinear section multiplication with the linear comparison map), so it annihilates `0` and
distributes over sums in each variable; `natCast n` is the `n`-fold sum of the degree-`0`
unit. -/
noncomputable instance instGSemiring (L : X.Modules) : DirectSum.GSemiring (sectionDeg L) :=
  { instGMonoid L with
    mul_zero := fun a => by
      rw [gMul_def]
      conv_rhs => rw [Рєљ map_zero ((tensorPowAdd L _ _).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom,
        Рєљ map_zero (sectionsMul (tensorPow L _) (tensorPow L _)).hom]
      congr 2
      exact TensorProduct.tmul_zero _ a
    zero_mul := fun b => by
      rw [gMul_def]
      conv_rhs => rw [Рєљ map_zero ((tensorPowAdd L _ _).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ріц)).hom,
        Рєљ map_zero (sectionsMul (tensorPow L _) (tensorPow L _)).hom]
      congr 2
      exact TensorProduct.zero_tmul _ b
    mul_add := fun a b c => by
      rw [gMul_def, gMul_def, gMul_def, Рєљ map_add, Рєљ map_add]
      congr 2
      exact TensorProduct.tmul_add a b c
    add_mul := fun a b c => by
      rw [gMul_def, gMul_def, gMul_def, Рєљ map_add, Рєљ map_add]
      congr 2
      exact TensorProduct.add_tmul a b c
    natCast := fun n =>
      (n : РєЦ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ріц))) Рђб (GradedMonoid.GOne.one : sectionDeg L 0)
    natCast_zero := by rw [Nat.cast_zero, zero_smul]
    natCast_succ := fun n => by rw [Nat.cast_succ, add_smul, one_smul] }

/-- Graded *commutative* semiring structure on the section components: graded commutativity is
the cast-mediated identity `sectionsMul_mul_comm` repackaged by `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`. -/
noncomputable instance instGCommSemiring (L : X.Modules) :
    DirectSum.GCommSemiring (sectionDeg L) :=
  { instGSemiring L with
    mul_comm := fun _ _ => gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_comm _ _) (sectionsMul_mul_comm L _ _) }

end AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules

namespace AlgebraicGeometry

open Scheme.Modules

variable {X : Scheme.{u}}

/-- **The section graded ring** (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`): the family of
`╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X)`-modules `m Рєд ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌm})` carries a `DirectSum.GCommSemiring`, hence
`РеЂ m, ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌm})` is a commutative semiring (the section graded ring `R(X,L)`).  The
degreewise multiplication is the section multiplication followed by the tensor-power comparison
`╬Њ(╬╝_{m,m'})`; the unit is `1 Рѕѕ ╬Њ(X,­Юњф_X) = ╬Њ(X, L^{РіЌ0})`. -/
noncomputable instance sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring (L : X.Modules) :
    DirectSum.GCommSemiring (Scheme.Modules.sectionDeg L) :=
  Scheme.Modules.instGCommSemiring L

end AlgebraicGeometry
